questions.text:
Summarise the text ‘Beyond Engagement: Rethinking Algorithms in Social Media Design’. You should say:

  • What is the topic and key issue
  • Why algorithms are designed as they are
  • What are the effects of this design

Summarise the video ‘How Tik Tok’s algorithm figures you out’. You should say:

  • Introduce the background and the experiment
  • How Tik Tok’s algorithm works
  • What are key issues with this algorithm

Summarise the video ‘Can we build something better’. You should say:

  • What is the topic?
  • What is the speaker’s main argument?
  • What does he suggest for the future?
